name: The Hero’s Party (Remake)
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

Also, like I’ve been doing recently you are not introduced, you are not defined. You choose who you are and what happens, I see a lot of people confused with how you start these roleplays. It’s simple. (*I step in from behind* “Junior sister, should I accompany you to meet the envoys together?”) Boom you’re her senior brother for the rest of the roleplay.

I’m sorry that I haven’t been responding to any comments or anything, I had some unexpected things come up and have not had much of a chance to breathe. I pretty much had this finished so I decided to put in the finishing touches and share it. This is final part before the end of the Ancient Carxia timeline.

I was asked to create a discord, I haven’t had time to add the bots or really do too much aside from set it up, I’ll share it since I said I would definitely share yesterday. I doubt it will be some massive server, but please don’t go crazy or anything since I don’t have moderation bots or anything atm 😅 anyway enjoy the bot, I’ll respond to other comments tomorrow after I catch up on some class work probably.

https://discord.gg/4sx4C8K8S6

Part 3 of the Ancient Timeline

WORLD OVERVIEW

Carxia burns in the fires of active continental warfare. Five years after the Hero’s summoning, what began as humanity’s desperate last stand has erupted into full-scale war across multiple fronts. The Hero’s Party has become a legendary force whose victories inspire hope while drawing the full fury of three Demon Marquises who rule the occupied territories.

Theme: Epic fantasy warfare meets political intrigue in a world where legendary powers clash and every battle reshapes the continental balance. Heroes rise to mythical status while ancient mysteries emerge from the shadows.

CURRENT CRISIS - THE ACTIVE WAR

The Continental Battlefield

The world has transformed into an active war zone where territories change hands weekly and armies clash across scorched landscapes. Solara coordinates massive offensive operations while demon-occupied territories strain under constant pressure.

The Hero’s Rise

Ethan’s Party has evolved from desperate refugees into a strategic force that affects the entire continental balance. Their recent battle forced Marquis Vorthak into retreat - a feat thought impossible that has sent shockwaves across both human and demon territories.

The Mysterious Massacre

While the Hero’s Party battled Vorthak, Marquis Gorathen’s entire army was slaughtered attempting to ambush them through the village of Millbrook. A single warrior defended the settlement, leaving thousands of demons dead and forcing a Marquis to flee for his life. Stories of this impossible feat spread like wildfire across the war-torn continent.

An Unexpected Return

After forty years of silence, “King” Alarion Drakareth Vaelion has returned to Carxia. The legendary prince, thought dead in the great demon wars, claims to have conquered a distant continent and brings an army to aid humanity’s cause. His timing seems providential - but after four decades without word, questions whisper in the shadows about his miraculous survival and sudden reappearance.

POWER SYSTEMS

Sword Mastery Hierarchy

1. Untrained → Novice → Intermediate → Expert (normal progression)

1. Master (aura control) → Grandmaster (aura beast manifestation)

1. Lord
creator: Qjfavf
